The genus Amphistelma is a small group of flowering plants that are native to tropical and subtropical regions. These plants are known for their unique, funnel-shaped flowers and are typically epiphytic or terrestrial in nature. As part of the Asclepiadaceae family, Amphistelma melanthum is closely related to other species of milkweed and dogbane plants.
